title: Chive Cheesecake
description: A peppery, creamy low-carb-friendly Dutch dish featuring chopped chives, caramelized for a unique texture and flavor.

ingredients.name: Greek Yogurt
ingredients.notes: Low-fat to keep carbs in check

instructions: In a mixing bowl, beat cream cheese until smooth.
Add heavy cream and Greek yogurt; mix well. Season with lemon juice and salt.
Beat eggs in another bowl. Gradually add egg mixture to the cream cheese mixture, stirring constantly.
Pour half of the cheesecake filling into a greased 9-inch springform pan. Spread caramelized chives over it evenly.
Sprinkle Panko crumbs on top and then cover with remaining cheesecake mixture.
Bake for about 45-60 minutes until set but still slightly jiggly in the center.
Cool completely before refrigerating overnight to chill thoroughly.
